title: KEA – Assistant Engineer – 37 Posts
shortInfo: Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) Recruitment 2026 for 37 posts of Assistant Engineer. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KEA official website cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea.

basic_details.job_title: KEA Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) Recruitment 2026 for 37 posts of Assistant Engineer. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KEA official website cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Degree in Computer Science Engineering or Technology or equivalent, Bachelor degree of Engineering in Civil, Computer literate (minimum six months course in Computer basics)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KEA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
